name: random-dice-roller
description: A utility plugin to simulate rolling dice (d6, d20, custom sides) for games and randomization tasks.
author: AGNT User

schema.title: Roll Dice
schema.description: Roll a specified number of dice with a custom number of sides and optional modifier.

quantity.description: The number of dice to roll (e.g., 1, 2, 5)

sides.description: The number of sides per die (e.g., 6 for a standard cube, 20 for a d20)

modifier.description: A flat number to add (positive) or subtract (negative) from the final total

total.description: The final sum of all dice rolls plus the modifier

individual_rolls.description: An array containing the result of each individual die roll

summary.description: A human-readable string summary of the result (e.g., 'Rolled 2d6+0: [3, 5] = 8')

success.description: True if the calculation was successful

schema.title: Flip Coin
schema.description: Flip a virtual coin to get Heads or Tails.

is_heads.description: True if Heads, False if Tails
